Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO INTERNET AND TECHNOLOGY

Title: Relates to prohibiting the use of stealth crawlers
Summary: Prohibits the deployment of a stealth crawler in a manner that would damage, impair or burden the operation of a covered news source or otherwise cause a news source economic harm.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general business law, in relation to prohibiting the use of stealth crawlers
